Editor (preview)

Frozen toolbar and body mock for a studio-style surface. Controls are non-functional; layout demonstrates token use for dense chrome.

Untitled draft

Movemental helps leaders ship courses, articles, and books without losing voice. This paragraph is placeholder body copy inside a card-on-section stack.

A second paragraph shows rhythm and spacing in the prose column. Replace with real editor output when wiring to a CMS.

“The primary is a light switch—reserve it for actions that move someone forward.”

Before you publish:

  • Check headings for hierarchy.
  • Confirm links open in sensible targets.
  • Scan for tone drift against your style guide.
